Source   Edit  

EC4X Core Library

This is the main module for the EC4X core library, providing all the fundamental game mechanics and data structures for the 4X strategy game.

OFFLINE-FIRST DESIGN: This library has zero network dependencies. It implements complete gameplay for local/hotseat multiplayer. Network transport (Nostr) wraps around this core without modifying it.

Imports

common/hex, common/system, engine/ship, engine/squadron, engine/fleet, engine/spacelift, engine/starmap, engine/gamestate, engine/orders, engine/resolve

Consts

defaultPlayers = 4
Source   Edit   
ec4xAuthor = "Mason Austin Green"
Source   Edit   
ec4xVersion = "0.1.0"
Source   Edit   
hexDirections = 6
Source   Edit   
maxPlayers = 12
Source   Edit   
minPlayers = 2
Source   Edit

proc validatePlayerCount(count: int): bool {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
